verses.1: Woe to those who go down to Egypt for help,
verses.2: Yet he also is wise, and will bring disaster,
verses.3: Now the Egyptians are men, and not God;
verses.4: For the LORD says to me,
verses.5: As birds hovering, so the LORD of Armies will protect Jerusalem.
verses.6: Return to him from whom you have deeply revolted, children of Israel.
verses.7: For in that day everyone shall cast away his idols of silver and his idols of gold—sin which your own hands have made for you.
verses.8: “The Assyrian will fall by the sword, not of man;
verses.9: His rock will pass away by reason of terror,
